title: Giant plasma-flier
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''giant plasma-flier''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of large space-borne creature native to the [[Marasa Nebula/Legends|Marasa Nebula]]. They were large and aggressive enough to pose a hazard to any [[Starship/Legends|starships]] that passed through the [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]], which forced the [[Marasan]]s, the native [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] species from the nearby [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Marasai]], to arm their ships.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-09-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]'' {{1stm}}
